user.title: Create Lighting Zone
user.description: Set up a new lighting zone with layered control

data_description.zone_name: Display name for this lighting zone
data_description.light_entities: Select lights to control in this zone
data_description.min_color_temp_kelvin: Warmest color temperature in Kelvin (2200 = very warm)
data_description.max_color_temp_kelvin: Coolest color temperature in Kelvin (5000 = daylight)

error.duplicate_zone: A zone with this name already exists
error.no_lights: Please select at least one light
error.invalid_brightness_range: Minimum brightness must be less than maximum brightness
error.invalid_color_temp_range: Minimum color temperature must be less than maximum color temperature

data_description.light_entities: Select lights to control in this zone
data_description.default_transition: How long light changes should take (0-300 seconds)

data_description.adaptive_enabled: Automatically adjust lights based on sun position
data_description.adaptive_brightness_min: Brightness when sun is below night threshold (1-255)
data_description.adaptive_brightness_max: Brightness when sun is above day threshold (1-255)
data_description.adaptive_color_temp_min: Color temperature at night in mireds (153=warm, 500=cool)
data_description.adaptive_color_temp_max: Color temperature during day in mireds
data_description.adaptive_elevation_min: Sun elevation below this = night mode (typically -6)
data_description.adaptive_elevation_max: Sun elevation above this = day mode (typically 15)

data_description.enable_weather_modifiers: Adjust lighting based on weather conditions
data_description.enable_occupancy_modifiers: Adjust lighting based on room occupancy
data_description.enable_climate_modifiers: Adjust lighting based on HVAC operation
